revision1_metadata.protocol_descriptor: label noise sweep | full-batch GD, MSE, no momentum, no WD | eval=100 | n_steps=5000 | eps=1e-5 | perturb=flat-unit-random direction RNG(seed+999999) | warmup=1000 @ lr=0.01 seed=0 (on clean data) | sharpness=15 power iter | noise_fractions=[0.0,0.1,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.9,1.0] | noise_seed=137 (same samples relabeled across train seeds) | EoS fixed from clean data (p=0.0) | outputs every 10 steps | loss+gn every step (saved [::10]) | sharpness every 100 steps (t>0) | D2=GP 20 log-radii [percentile 1..95] fit[4:16] subsample<=2000 | Lyap=linregress log(dist) step window [0.2T,0.8T] | version=r1-phase3a-2026-04-14
revision1_metadata.merge_note: Merged original seeds [0,1,2] with extra seeds [3,4,5,6]. 7 seeds total per condition per noise level.
